toolRequests.intentionSummary: Build single project to verify it works

data.reasoningText:
The build is "succeeding" but it's not actually building any individual projects! It only builds the solution-level restore and build target, but doesn't compile any of the csproj files. The issue is that the solution file doesn't have a proper `GlobalSection(ProjectConfigurationPlatforms)` mapping. Without that, MSBuild doesn't know which projects to build for which configuration.

The solution file has `SolutionConfigurationPlatforms` but is missing `ProjectConfigurationPlatforms`. Let me verify this and then fix it, and also try building individually to confirm.

data.content: The solution file is missing `ProjectConfigurationPlatforms`, so MSBuild skips all projects during the build. Let me fix the solution and do a proper parallel build.

arguments.old_str:
Global
	GlobalSection(SolutionConfigurationPlatforms) = preSolution
		Debug|Any CPU = Debug|Any CPU
		Release|Any CPU = Release|Any CPU
	EndGlobalSection
EndGlobal
